meta.title: Emmanuel Alanis - Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Full-stack developer building scalable web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

hero.name: Emmanuel Alanis
hero.bio: AI-first developer shipping production software at human-team speed.
hero.bioExtended: SOFOM middleware. Enterprise delivery platforms. Multi-tenant SaaS. KYC and biometrics. I orchestrate Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini to ship at a cadence a human-only team can't match.

items.description: Leading systems development for a credit-operations platform. Federal payment middleware, KYC biometrics, transactional email infrastructure, security audits. Migrating PHP/Symfony legacy to TypeScript microservices with Claude Code as daily driver.

Shipped Ready Set (enterprise delivery, San Francisco), Vetify (multi-tenant veterinary SaaS), Destino SF (specialty food e-commerce), Pagaré Fácil (Mexican promissory notes), FitTrackr (Gemini-OCR fitness app). Production payments with Stripe and Square.
Learned modern web development by building real products end to end.

items.name: Ready Set
items.description: Enterprise delivery platform with driver, vendor, and customer management. Same-day delivery, on-demand services, and real-time tracking.

items.name: FitTrackr
items.description: AI-powered fitness tracker with OCR for nutrition labels, workout planning, and progress analytics.

items.name: Pagare Facil
items.description: Promissory note generator with intuitive interface for debtor info, payment terms, and PDF generation.

cta.title: Interested in working together?
cta.description: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities and interesting projects.
